ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., Enzyme Kinetics, Drug Screening) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Canceled) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plate belongs to */,
  "plate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the plate in the experiment */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of the plate (e.g., 96-well, 384-well) */,
  "plate_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the plate was used (e.g., pH, temperature) */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the plate */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate the well belongs to */,
  "well_number" TEXT /* Number of the well (e.g., A01, B02) */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of the well (e.g., Sample, Blank, Control) */,
  "well_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions specific to the well (e.g., concentration, buffer) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time at which the absorbance was measured */,
  "absorbance" REAL /* Absorbance value recorded at the measurement time */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the absorbance measurement (e.g., AU, OD) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Postdoc, Graduate Student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-researcher association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_in_experiment" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment (e.g., Lead, Co-Investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_researchers_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reagents" (
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reagent */,
  "reagent_name" TEXT /* Name of the reagent */,
  "reagent_type" TEXT /* Type of the reagent (e.g., Enzyme, Substrate, Inhibitor) */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the reagent */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the reagent */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the reagent */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reagent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_reagents" (
  "well_reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well-reagent association */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent */,
  "reagent_volume" TEXT /* Volume of the reagent added to the well */,
  "concentration_used" TEXT /* Concentration of the reagent used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_reagents_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_reagents_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., spectrophotometer, plate reader) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration (e.g., standard, extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibration_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_maintenance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "experiment_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
